entry.title: claude-code v2.1.209 released
entry.summary: What's changed Fixed /model and other dialogs being blocked in claude agents background sessions (reverts an overly broad guard)

entry.title: Xanadu and Lockheed Martin Integrate PennyLane into Quantum Training Program
entry.summary: Photonic quantum computing company Xanadu (NASDAQ/TSX: XNDU) and Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) have expanded their partnership to scale quantum training and workforce development. Under this strategic effort, Lockheed Martin will integrate Xanadu’s open-source quantum programming stack, PennyLane, into its internal Quant — Also covered by: The Quantum Insider

entry.title: Now, defenders are embracing the prompt injection, too - Ars Technica
entry.summary: Now, defenders are embracing the prompt injection, too Ars Technica — Also covered by: Ars Technica AI

entry.title: DeepSeek needs more cash just weeks after closing its first $7 billion round
entry.summary: DeepSeek is already raising again. The Chinese AI lab just closed its first funding round and needs capital for its own data centers and chips to keep its aggressive pricing strategy going. The article DeepSeek needs more cash just weeks after closing its first $7 billion round appeared first on The Decoder .

entry.title: Overtone, a "voice- and audio-forward" dating service founded by Hinge creator Justin McLeod that uses AI to make "highly curated introductions", raised $18M (Amanda Silberling/TechCrunch)
entry.summary: Amanda Silberling / TechCrunch : Overtone, a “voice- and audio-forward” dating service founded by Hinge creator Justin McLeod that uses AI to make “highly curated introductions”, raised $18M — Hinge founder Justin McLeod announced an $18 million fundraise for his new dating company, Overtone.

entry.title: llama.cpp b10007 released
entry.summary: opencl: fix a dp4a bug for devices where cl_khr_integer_dot_product is unavailable ( #25639 ) opencl: do not fail backend init on devices without cl_khr_integer_dot_product opencl: do not call dp4 kernels when dp is unavailable Co-authored-by: Li He lih@qti.qualcomm.com macOS/iOS: macOS Apple Silicon (arm64) macOS Appl

entry.title: ollama v0.32.0 released
entry.summary: What's Changed New interactive agent experience: running ollama now launches an agent to help you code and delegate work ❯ ollama Ollama 0.32.0 ▸ Chat, Code, & Work (glm-5.2:cloud) Chat with models, code, search the web, and delegate real work Renamed the Codex App integration to ChatGPT: use ollama launch chatgpt (and

entry.title: New York becomes first US state to suspend data centre development
entry.summary: Governor Kathy Hochul signs one-year moratorium on new construction amid backlash over infrastructure needs

entry.title: CLIR-Bench: Benchmarking Multimodal Question Answering over Irregular Clinical Time Series
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.09880v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Clinical time series are central to patient monitoring, risk assessment, and clinical decision support. However, they are often sparse, irregularly sampled, and asynchronous, making it difficult for models to identify the temporal evidence required for clinical Question A

entry.title: PrismML launches Bonsai 27B, a model based on Qwen3.6 27B that it says runs natively on Apple devices via MLX; its CEO says Apple is evaluating the tech (MacKenzie Sigalos/CNBC)
entry.summary: MacKenzie Sigalos / CNBC : PrismML launches Bonsai 27B, a model based on Qwen3.6 27B that it says runs natively on Apple devices via MLX; its CEO says Apple is evaluating the tech — Apple is in talks with a small Silicon Valley company that says it can shrink powerful artificial intelligence models enough to run direct

entry.title: New York becomes first state to impose one-year pause on new AI datacenters
entry.summary: Governor Kathy Hochul issues executive order enacting a moratorium on the large, resource-intensive AI facilities New York became the first US state to enact a moratorium on new datacenters on Tuesday. Governor Kathy Hochul issued an executive order mandating a one-year statewide pause on the large facilities used to p

entry.title: Agentic Security Needs Its Own Framework: The Straiker STAR Framework | Straiker
entry.summary: In agentic AI, the model behaves and the user is legitimate. The weapon is the context the agent reads. Here is why we built the Straiker STAR Framework to map the agentic attack surface, and how it supplements the NIST AI RMF and OWASP.

entry.title: Microsoft releases Windows 10 KB5099539 extended security update
entry.summary: Microsoft has released the Windows 10 KB5099539 extended security update, which includes the July 2026 Patch Tuesday security updates for 570 vulnerabilities, along with additional security fixes. [...]

entry.title: vllm v0.25.1 released
entry.summary: vLLM v0.25.1 Highlights This release features 2 commits from 2 contributors (1 new)! v0.25.1 is a patch release containing two targeted bug fixes on top of v0.25.0. Bug Fixes Avoid blocking model launching when no system FFmpeg is available for TorchCodec ( #47888 ). Previously import torchcodec raised a RuntimeError a

entry.title: lobste.rs is now running on SQLite
entry.summary: lobste.rs is now running on SQLite Community site Lobsters has been planning a migration away from MariaDB since August 2018 - originally targeting PostgreSQL, but last year they decided to investigate SQLite instead. This weekend they completed the migration, and now consider it stable enough that it looks like this i

entry.title: D-topia review – cosy sci-fi mystery takes aim at AI
entry.summary: PC, PS5, Xbox Series X/S, Nintendo Switch, Nintendo Switch 2; Marimittu Games A soft puzzle game makes a sharp point about the over-optimised future ahead In the far future, on a planet that is not Earth, AI is in charge. This entity is no Skynet-esque killer robot but a machine that cares for humanity. Manifesting mos

entry.title: NTHU and Top Taiwan Venture Capital Launch NT$1 Billion ($34M USD) “NTHU Future Fund” for Deep Tech Startups
entry.summary: National Tsing Hua University (NTHU) and Top Taiwan Venture Capital Co., Ltd. have officially launched the NTHU Future Fund. Announced during the 2026 Taiwan Venture Capital & Private Equity Annual Conference in Hsinchu, the public-private partnership establishes a long-term capital vehicle specifically tailored to gui

entry.title: The founder of Hinge raised $18M to build a new AI dating service, Overtone
entry.summary: Overtone describes itself as "a voice- and audio-forward service, enabled by AI, that provides highly curated introductions."

entry.title: Was testing Qwen 3.6 local model and it had a crash out.
entry.summary: I don't know what happened here. All I asked for was to remove/replace NaNs in a dataframe lol. submitted by /u/No-Understanding9654 [link] [comments]

entry.title: How to Debug Coding Agents with LangSmith Traces
entry.summary: Use LangSmith to trace coding agents across Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, and more. Inspect tool calls, subagents, errors, costs, and retries.

entry.title: How to manage AI investments in the agentic era
entry.summary: Learn how enterprises can manage AI investments in the agentic era by measuring useful work per dollar, improving efficiency, and scaling high-value workflows.

entry.title: IBM shares plunge 25% as customers shift spending to AI
entry.summary: Chief executive Arvind Krishna says company ‘faltered’ as clients raced to buy servers and storage

entry.title: DeepSeek weighs new fundraising a month after closing first round
entry.summary: Unusually swift pace of capital injection comes as Chinese AI start-up seeks to build out infrastructure

entry.title: Faithful by Design: Evaluating and Improving LLM-Generated Clinical Trial Summaries for Multi-Stakeholder Audiences
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.09932v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models are increasingly used to summarize clinical trial results for healthcare providers, patients, and payers, but their tendency to hallucinate poses significant risks in this high-stakes context. This study introduces a benchmark evaluation framework fo

entry.title: Can AI build a jet engine? JARVIS Challenge tests role of AI copilots in tough-tech engineering
entry.summary: MIT students designed, built, and tested a jet engine with AI copilots, assessing AI’s usefulness in developing high-performance aerospace systems.

entry.title: Nemotron Labs: How Open Models Give Enterprises and Nations AI They Can Trust, Control and Customize
entry.summary: Enterprises have plenty of powerful models to choose from. The real test is whether the AI an enterprise builds uniquely addresses the needs of the business: improving workflows, tapping into domain knowledge and exceeding standards for accuracy and trust.

entry.title: datasette code-frequency chart on GitHub
entry.summary: datasette code-frequency chart on GitHub Out of curiosity I decided to see if I could find a useful illustration of the impact of coding agents and Opus 4.5 class models on my own output. The best I've found so far is this GitHub chart of frequency of code changes to my Datasette open source project: The big spike in a

entry.title: What building Shippy taught us about building agents
entry.summary: Building Shippy taught us that reliable agents depend less on the model itself than on deterministic tools, explicit guardrails, isolated infrastructure, and evaluations grounded in real-world workflows and live data.

entry.title: A data bottleneck could slow the superintelligence race
entry.summary: And that could be a good thing

entry.title: Deepmind CEO Hassabis says "nobody in the world knows what happens next" so "cautious optimism" means building guardrails now
entry.summary: Google Deepmind CEO Demis Hassabis has published a sweeping proposal for how to handle advanced AI. He wants a new US standards body modeled after financial regulator FINRA that would develop evaluation protocols for frontier models and could coordinate a slowdown in AI development if needed. Startups and research mode
